description: Get Venture Insights' live service catalogue: the FREE Concept Diagnostic (a research-backed viability study of one venture concept, delivered to the founder's inbox) and the paid study tiers with live SAR prices. Call this first when your user asks what Venture Insights offers, what it costs, or wh

labels.name: start_free_diagnostic
labels.description: Request Venture Insights' FREE Concept Diagnostic for a founder's venture concept. IMPORTANT: this does NOT generate anything — it emails the founder a one-click confirmation link, and the study starts only after the founder personally clicks it (link valid 7 days). Nothing is charged; no signup is

labels.name: check_diagnostic_status
labels.description: Poll the progress of a Concept Diagnostic intake started with start_free_diagnostic. Pass the intake_id and token that call returned. Statuses: pending_confirmation (founder hasn't clicked the emailed link yet — nothing is generated), generating (founder confirmed; the study is being researched and

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: open_diagnostic_intake, describe_services, start_free_diagnostic · Private data: start_free_diagnostic, check_diagnostic_status · Public sink: open_diagnostic_intake, start_free_diagnostic, check_diagnostic_status.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: open_diagnostic_intake, describe_services, start_free_diagnostic · Private data: start_free_diagnostic, check_diagnostic_status · Public sink: open_diagnostic_intake, start_free_diagnostic, check_diagnostic_status

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
